description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian figure with exaggerated facial features, including large, wide-open eyes and a prominent nose. He has short, side-swept hair and is dressed in a simple, casual outfit consisting of a short-sleeve t-shirt, fitted pants, and sneakers. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The figure's proportions are cartoon-like, with a slightly oversized head and slim limbs. The surface appears smooth and matte, with clear, defined edges and minimal textural detail. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for urban or animated environments.
description: A stylized adult male pedestrian with large eyes, short hair, and casual clothing, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a cartoon-like appearance and smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the expressive face, large eyes, and full outfit details with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, hair volume, and the slimness of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, hair shape, and the straight alignment of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed posture of the hands.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
